local_sources: The user's legal, tax or compliance question and optional local reference material
local_processing: Validate prompt structure and required sections
Check deterministic citation and source-hierarchy rules

codex_context.purpose: Understand and restructure the research request
codex_context.content: The question and facts typed or attached by the user
codex_context.minimum_necessary: The workflow cannot remove material already typed into Codex; ask the user to provide only facts needed for the research question

codex_context.purpose: Produce the source-backed Deep Research prompt
codex_context.content: Necessary facts, legal or tax scope, source hierarchy and citation requirements
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Carry forward only facts that materially constrain the research request

residual_risks.risk: Names or case facts entered in the initial Codex prompt are already in model context before Vera can minimize them
residual_risks.mitigation: State this boundary explicitly and instruct the user to omit unnecessary identifiers; do not claim deterministic anonymization

commercialista_notice.message_it: Il testo già inserito nella conversazione è già nel contesto di Codex. Per ottimizzare il prompt, includi solo i fatti necessari alla ricerca ed evita identificativi non pertinenti.
commercialista_notice.message_en: Text already entered in the conversation is already in Codex context. For prompt optimization, include only facts necessary for the research and omit irrelevant identifiers.

limitations: Vera cannot retroactively remove content already sent in the conversation
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
